title: Totem of Rick Roll
description: A mod That Adds a custom Rick Roll totem (Animated) big update soon!
body:
🎭 _ Features_

✅ Replaces Totem of Undying with a Rick Roll Animated Totem 🧩 Compatible with vanilla gameplay and datapacks
🔁 Modular asset structure for easy editing and streamer swaps
Custom GUI (Soon)
Custom Background (Soon)
Custom Armor and Weapons (Soon)
Custom End Crystals and Respawn Anchors (Soon)
PvP Utilities (Soon)
🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.20+
Join Our Discord for Support
